title: transport: mine_token has no timeout; diff=30 can hang client indefinitely
description: transport.rs:418-424 / pow.rs:226: mine_token() iterates nonces with no cancellation or timeout. At diff=MAX_DIFFICULTY=30, expected mining time is ~1 billion SHA-256 pairs (several minutes to hours depending on hardware). spawn_blocking is called with no timeout; a rogue relay advertising diff=30 causes the client to hang indefinitely during the auth handshake. The diff <= MAX_DIFFICULTY guard prevents diff > 30 but does not prevent the mining itself from running unboundedly long. Fix: add a timeout to the spawn_blocking call, or pass a cancellation token to mine_token.
